untranslatable_reason: This signal requires calculating a linear regression model of mutual fund cash reserves vs. short-term interest rates, computing predicted values, measuring standard deviations of residuals, and tracking multi-day divergence persistence. None of these derived metrics (regression prediction, residual std dev, cash reserve divergence) are available in the allowed indicator set. The signal fundamentally requires custom indicator construction (Fosback Index / mutual fund cash positioning analysis) that cannot be expressed using only price, volume, and standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: Signal ID ARONSON_DRY_0_1 describes a macro-level mean reversion strategy based on institutional cash positioning relative to interest rates. While the logic is sound (contrarian positioning on extreme cash divergence), the required data inputs (mutual fund cash reserves, interest rate relationships, regression-based predictions) fall outside the scope of market price/volume/volatility indicators. Implementation would require a dedicated custom indicator computing the Fosback Index or equivalent institutional cash flow metric.
